title: Nasal carriage rate and antibiotic susceptibility pattern of Neisseria meningitidis among healthy Ethiopian children and adolescents
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2rigl","text":"Background: Community nasal meningococcal carriage rates are high across Africa.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"64p6s","text":"Meningococcal infections are major causes of morbidity and mortality in the continent;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1tcs9","text":"especially among children and adolescents. This study aimed to determine the prevalence of","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3horo","text":"nasal carriage and antibiotic susceptibilities of meningococcal isolates from healthy Ethiopian","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"frgvf","text":"children and adolescents.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1rjsr","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9bldd","text":"Method: A cross-sectional study was conducted in one of the sub-cities of Addis","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6s0u4","text":"Ababa, Ethiopia. Nasal swabs were collected and processed for identification, serogrouping and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"40p2m","text":"testingsusceptibilities for three antibiotics using standard microbiological techniques. Data on","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6b226","text":"epidemiologic risk factors were collected using a structured questionnaire and the magnitude of","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bu81b","text":"their association with carriage was assessed using bivariate and multivariate analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8gl3g","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"51l6c","text":"Result: A total of 240 samples were collected (115 from males and 125 from females). The","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9jsr7","text":"mean age of study participants was 11.1 years. The prevalence of nasal carriage for Neisseria ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":84,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"celq7","text":"meningitidis was 20.4% (49/240). Carriage was significantly higher among children living under","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cmutk","text":"crowded conditions (OR1.268; 95% CI: 1.186 – 1.355; p = 0.006). The predominant serogroups","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eq705","text":"were W135 – 20/49 isolates (40.8%) and C - 12/49 isolates (24.5%) and 83.7% of meningococci","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2q3gg","text":"were sensitive for Ciprofloxacin. In contrast, isolates showed high resistance to Ceftriaxone","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dljcn","text":"(69.4%) while only 4.2% were sensitive for Penicillin. Multi-drug resistance was documented for","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6nmql","text":"14.3% of the isolates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9tffe","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4hkvm","text":"Conclusions: Meningococcal carriage rate was found to be high with higher rates associated","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c2v5s","text":"with children and adolescents living in crowded living conditions. Predominant isolates were of","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aspvc","text":"serogroup W135 and C and the isolates showed marked susceptibility to Ciprofloxacin and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"er4he","text":"resistance to Ceftriaxone and Penicillin.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d63sc","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97mms","text":"Keywords: N. meningitidis, Nasal carriage, Antibiotic susceptibility, Serogroup, Children,","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":8},{"style":"italic","offset":10,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"312o8","text":"Adolescents, Ethiopia","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
